title: About Me
description:
Hi everyone! My name’s Álvaro Martín.

I could tell you I’m just a university student with a deep curiosity for technology and financial markets—and if you’re in a hurry, that’s the perfect "whoami" summary.

### The Professional Version

I am a final-year student pursuing a Dual Bachelor’s in Data Science and Telecommunication Technologies Engineering at Universidad Carlos III de Madrid. My goal is to be a perpetual learner, with a particular focus on Machine Learning and its applications within financial markets.

My experience includes:
* Front-office automation at Santander CIB.
* Software development at NTT DATA.
* Research Assistant at UC3M, developing ML models for suicide prevention.

I love a good challenge, but what I enjoy most is solving those challenges alongside people smarter than me—it’s the fastest way to grow.

Welcome to my portfolio!
